summary: Testing complete for Weekly RM Performance Digest and SLA Escalation Email features. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All City Hub features verified (4 routes tested). Email sending is handled gracefully when Resend API key is not set - logic runs correctly but skips actual email delivery.

issues: Console warnings about hydration error: <span> cannot be child of <select>/<option> - minor React rendering issue

critical_code_review_comments: Email digest service correctly sends to all active RMs and returns {sent, failed, total_rms}
SLA escalation correctly identifies leads >2x threshold and respects 24h cooldown per lead
Both admin endpoints properly require admin role (returns 403 for RM/other roles)
Resend API key missing is handled gracefully - skips email but still logs and returns correct counts
City Hub page correctly displays 4 cities with venue count, starting price, max capacity, area tags
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing test lead 'lead_esc_test_3cd120c7' (Vikram Kapoor) for escalation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email digest and SLA escalation features fully tested. Weekly digest sends to 4 RMs. SLA escalation targets leads >2x threshold - test lead Vikram Kapoor (400h in shortlisted, threshold 168h, 2x=336h) was escalated once and is now in 24h cooldown. Resend API key not set in backend/.env so actual emails are not delivered but logic runs correctly. City Hub at /venues working with all SEO routes preserved.

POST /api/admin/send-weekly-digests.notes: Email delivery skipped when RESEND_API_KEY not set

POST /api/admin/send-sla-escalations.notes: Returns 0 when no critical breaches or in 24h cooldown

GET /api/venues/cities.returns: 4 cities with venue_count, slug, min_price, max_capacity, areas

mocked_apis.notes: Email delivery via Resend is skipped when API key not set, but this is handled gracefully - not a mock
